examples: Unlike all of those other so-called heroes who battle the bad guys come hell or high water, Paramecium is a deserter not a fighter.
And unlike all of those other so-called heroes, who battle the bad guys come hell or high water, Paramecium is a fleer not a fighter.
The structure of the cortical surface of Paramecium bursaria is studied. On the whole surface of Paramecium, there is a network formed by the convex of the pellicle.
